items.title: Trey Kaufman-Renn actually showed off a new found perimeter touch during the G League combine.
items.author: Leo S
items.body_excerpt:
Trey Kaufman-Renn actually showed off a new found perimeter touch during the G League combine.

It was enough to impress scouts that he got an invite to the NBA draft combine

items.title: Respectfully, Trey Kaufman-Renn is playing basketball out there like you just started MyPlayer mode and just don't have enough skill points yet.
items.author: Leo S
items.body_excerpt:
Respectfully, Trey Kaufman-Renn is playing basketball out there like you just started MyPlayer mode and just don't have enough skill points yet.

Like "Damn wtf I didn't pass there!" Or "Wtf I'm out of turbo already??"

items.title: T-Wolves up 62-51. Pacers 17 of 42 from the floor, 6 of 16 from 3, 6 of 8 at the line. T-Wolves 19 of 36, 4 of 12, 11 of 12. Slawson 12 points, six rebounds, three assists, four blocks, three turnovers. McGlothan 9 points. Isaiah Evans 10, Zyon Pullin 10, Trey Kaufman-Renn 10.
items.author: Dustin Dopirak

items.title: I blame this loss (and the Wolves pursuit of their 1st LVSL title) on Trey Kaufman-Renn getting ruled out due to a mouth contusion.
items.author: Leo S
items.body_excerpt:
I blame this loss (and the Wolves pursuit of their 1st LVSL title) on Trey Kaufman-Renn getting ruled out due to a mouth contusion.

Would've been our year 😔

Trey "The Philosopher" Kaufman-Renn has 3 offensive rebounds in just 10 mins.

Who does that remind you of?? 🙏

items.title: With the 59th pick of the NBA Draft the Minnesota Timberwolves select Trey Kaufman-Renn!
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
With the 59th pick of the NBA Draft the Minnesota Timberwolves select Trey Kaufman-Renn!

The 2026 NBA Draft is LIVE on ESPN.

items.title: With Timberwolves selecting Trey Kaufman-Renn at 59 (and Braden Smith to the Pacers at 38), it's just the second time Purdue has had multiple players taken in the same NBA draft.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
With Timberwolves selecting Trey Kaufman-Renn at 59 (and Braden Smith to the Pacers at 38), it's just the second time Purdue has had multiple players taken in the same NBA draft.

First time since JaJuan Johnson & E’Twaun Moore in 2011.
